API_KEY.description: LLM provider API key (e.g. OpenRouter, OpenAI, Anthropic)

PROVIDER.description: LLM provider name (openrouter, openai, anthropic, gemini, groq, mistral, deepseek, ollama, etc.)

ZEROCLAW_MODEL.description: Model to use (provider-specific format, e.g. anthropic/claude-sonnet-4-20250514)

ZEROCLAW_ALLOW_PUBLIC_BIND.description: Allow binding to public interfaces (must be true for Railway)

ZEROCLAW_GATEWAY_HOST.description: Gateway bind address (0.0.0.0 for Railway networking)
